refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall support achieving the customer-defined cycle time target for the load→travel→dump cycle.
refined_fr.rationale: The candidate FR is already focused on a single functional objective: supporting achievement of a cycle time target for a specific operational cycle. It does not include multiple obligations or implementation details, thus it is atomic and solution-neutral.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure the cycle time for the load→travel→dump cycle under the agreed duty cycle and site conditions, and verify that the 95th percentile (p95) cycle time is less than or equal to the customer-defined target.

candidate_dps: Optimize load handling mechanism to minimize load time
Optimize travel path and speed control to minimize travel time
Optimize dump mechanism to minimize dump time
Coordinate load, travel, and dump operations to minimize total cycle time
Implement adaptive cycle time control based on real-time conditions
selected_dp.selected_dp: Coordinate load, travel, and dump operations to minimize total cycle time

potential_sources: Interdependence between load, travel, and dump operations timing
coupling_check.notes: The selected DP explicitly addresses coordination among sub-operations to minimize total cycle time, which supports independence by managing interactions at the coordination level rather than tightly coupling individual mechanisms.

assumptions_risks: Assumes that coordination can be effectively implemented without introducing significant overhead or complexity
Risk that real-time conditions may vary beyond modeled assumptions affecting cycle time
Assumes that safety plans and operational policies do not impose constraints that prevent optimization of cycle time
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider explicitly including real-time monitoring and adaptive control in the DP to handle variability in site conditions and operational policies, enhancing robustness of cycle time achievement.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Coordinates load, travel, and dump operations to minimize total cycle time across the system

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Exchanges status and performance data with Vehicle and Teleoperation modules

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Receives operational commands and task assignments from Teleoperation

external_interfaces.name: SafetyAlert
external_interfaces.details: Sends safety-related alerts to Safety Services

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Communicates with external systems and modules for coordination

module_containment_scores.notes: Highly cohesive as it centrally manages coordination logic; minimal diffusion outside this module.
Contains some operational aspects but coordination logic would be diffused across other modules.
Primarily focused on remote control, not coordination of load/travel/dump operations.
Focused on safety alerts, not operational coordination.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: The NGHE Solution module is the most appropriate boundary to contain the DP as it is designed to coordinate complex operational tasks and minimize cycle time, centralizing the logic and minimizing diffusion.
containment_risks: Potential complexity growth within NGHE Solution may require internal sub-modularization to maintain clarity.
Interfaces with Vehicle and Teleoperation must be well-defined to avoid hidden coupling.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The DP logically addresses the FR by specifying coordination of load, travel, and dump operations to minimize total cycle time, directly supporting the customer-defined cycle time target.

diffusion_risks: Interfaces with Vehicle and Teleoperation modules could lead to diffusion if coordination logic is partially implemented outside NGHE Solution.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: The NGHE Solution module has high containment (score 9) and low diffusion (score 1), indicating that the DP is well centralized within this IM. However, care must be taken to manage interface complexity and avoid hidden coupling that could cause diffusion.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification is feasible through measuring cycle time p95 against the CT_target under defined duty cycles and site conditions, as well as ensuring compliance with worksite safety plans.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: The allocation of the FR to the NGHE Solution IM is clear and appropriate, with well-defined interfaces supporting operational commands, telemetry, safety alerts, and network communication.

recommended_revisions: Monitor complexity growth within the NGHE Solution module and consider internal sub-modularization to maintain clarity and manageability.
Define and document interface contracts with Vehicle and Teleoperation modules explicitly to prevent hidden coupling and diffusion of coordination logic.
Establish verification procedures that include performance measurement and safety compliance to ensure FR satisfaction at the IM level.

decision.justification: Although the current FR, DP, and IM are well aligned and verification is feasible, the high safety criticality and noted risks of interface diffusion and complexity growth warrant further decomposition. Deriving next-level sub-FRs will help clarify internal modularization, explicitly define interface contracts, and better manage complexity and safety verification at a finer granularity.

revise.why: To address the risk of complexity growth and potential diffusion, internal sub-modularization within the NGHE Solution IM should be defined and documented, along with explicit interface contracts to Vehicle and Teleoperation modules.

assumptions: The NGHE Solution module currently encapsulates the DP with high containment and low diffusion scores.
Interfaces with Vehicle and Teleoperation modules are critical and pose diffusion risks if not well managed.
Verification procedures can be established at sub-module levels to ensure safety and performance.
open_risks: Potential hidden coupling and diffusion of coordination logic across modules.
Complexity growth within the NGHE Solution IM may reduce clarity and maintainability.
Ensuring safety compliance under all duty cycles and site conditions.
evidence_needed: Detailed interface contracts and module boundary definitions.
Verification plans and test cases for sub-modules.
Monitoring data on complexity metrics within NGHE Solution IM over time.
